profile_backing.ready_perf_beads: none at pass start; g8wys filed from pass143 profile-backed residual
profile_backing.source: pass143 profile showed random_uniform_1m_f64 around 9.4 ms and random_normal_1m_f64 still hot after threaded inverse-erf transform
profile_backing.alien_graveyard_route: loop fusion / streaming dataflow / allocation elimination over a counter-based RNG stream
profile_backing.alien_artifact_contract: compile the stream-fusion idea into a deterministic artifact with key-counter, ordering, FP-expression, and golden-digest proof obligations

lever_tested.description: Generate ThreeFry uniform mantissas over contiguous counter ranges and immediately write sqrt(2) * erf_inv_approx(u) normal samples into the output, avoiding the intermediate uniform Vec.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-g8wys-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'random/normal_1m_f64|random/uniform_1m_f64' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-g8wys-after-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'random/normal_1m_f64|random/uniform_1m_f64' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

score.reason: Candidate normal midpoint regressed versus both the fresh cross-worker baseline and the recent ts1 current-code baseline; no source hunk retained.

isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.ordering: Candidate wrote disjoint contiguous chunks; each output index used counter [0, i].
isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.floating_point: Per element used the same min + unit * scale uniform expression and sqrt(2) * erf_inv_approx(u); no reductions, reassociation, mul_add, or mixed precision.
isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.rng: ThreeFry key schedule, counter mapping, rounds, mantissa extraction, and tail handling unchanged.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-g8wys-proof-threefry cargo test -p fj-lax --lib threefry -- --nocapture

next_primitive.description: Do not retune fused/parallel normal stream shape. Attack a different distribution-core algorithm: a Box-Muller or Ziggurat normal generator behind an explicit JAX-parity contract only if the public RNG stream contract permits changing normal sample sequence; otherwise route to random_randint/generate_u32_bits parallelization or categorical/Gumbel fusion with a fresh profile-backed bead.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate, with behavior contract decided before implementation
